message.content:
In the project at /Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/lux-flow-fe, find:
1. All available shadcn UI components in src/shared/ui/ (list the folder structure)
2. The Table component if it exists (src/shared/ui/table/)
3. The Badge component if it exists
4. The payment types at src/shared/types/payment.types.ts
5. The wallet API hooks at src/shared/api/query-hooks/use-wallet.ts
6. The BackButton component at src/shared/ui/back-button

List file paths and key exports/types for each.
